exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your digital nomad planning forward
items: Research and compile a list of 5 countries with favorable visa policies for digital nomads from your nationality
Calculate your minimum monthly budget needed to maintain your current lifestyle while traveling
Set up and test your complete remote work infrastructure including backup internet, power, and communication solutions
Research and secure comprehensive travel insurance that covers remote work, medical emergencies, and equipment protection
Create a detailed skills inventory and identify 3 specific areas to strengthen for better remote work opportunities
Document and digitize all essential paperwork including passport, licenses, insurance cards, and create a secure cloud backup system
